---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new tool, skill, or feature for FoneClaw
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
---

**Is your feature request related to a problem?**

A description of the problem: "I'm always frustrated when..."

**Proposed solution**

A clear description of what you want to happen.

**Alternatives considered**

Any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional context**

Screenshots, mockups, or examples that help explain your request.

**Category**

- [ ] New tool (e.g., a new device capability)
- [ ] New skill (a task knowledge pack)
- [ ] New workflow template
- [ ] UI/UX improvement
- [ ] Documentation improvement
- [ ] Other
